heading: View Regionalized Private Endpoint Settings
body:
To return the regionalized private endpoint settings for your project using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas privateEndpoints regionalModes describe [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas privateEndpoints regionalModes describe](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-privateEndpoints-regionalModes-describe).

Atlas UI
